evidence_boundary.definition: Local corpus + archive-backed evidence + deep-root authorities + generated MATH GOD bundles + whole-project runtime surfaces.

bounded_pressures.reason: Live Google Docs remain unavailable until OAuth credentials exist locally.
Route remains bounded by 7D seed gate state and cannot silently promote.
Route remains bounded by 7D seed gate state and cannot silently promote.

lift_chain.title: Treat 256^4 as the compiled Water control field.
Enter the overlay-only 1024^6 Water control surface.
Return the 1024^6 lift to the live 4D stack without drift.

corpus_nuclei.title: Root Operating Thesis
corpus_nuclei.role: Defines the Circle within Square within Triangle geometry and the corridor truth lattice.
corpus_nuclei.pressure: The root law exists, but too many subsystems still restate it differently.

corpus_nuclei.title: Active Nervous System
corpus_nuclei.role: Provides the current control-plane scaffold for capsules, chapters, appendices, frontiers, and shadows.
corpus_nuclei.pressure: The scaffold is strong, but some downstream shells are thinner than the scaffold implies.

corpus_nuclei.title: Realtime Swarm Board
corpus_nuclei.role: Runs the live multi-agent board, active threads, tensor overlays, and swarm runtime surfaces.
corpus_nuclei.pressure: Coordination became more real than its surrounding manuscript shell, creating a board-shell split.

corpus_nuclei.title: Global Orchestration Synthesis
corpus_nuclei.role: Holds the clearest live whole-corpus diagnosis with body counts, pressure fronts, and gate status.
corpus_nuclei.pressure: It names the whole organism well, but needs stronger links back into reusable manuscript law.

corpus_nuclei.title: Atlas Waist
corpus_nuclei.role: Acts as the live searchable waist for the entire local corpus.
corpus_nuclei.pressure: The atlas sees the corpus, but not every high-value surface has a strong route proof back into use.

corpus_nuclei.title: Archive Waist
corpus_nuclei.role: Exposes hidden ZIP-backed frameworks as addressable evidence rather than dark storage.
corpus_nuclei.pressure: Archive visibility has outrun archive promotion into comfortable live working roots.

corpus_nuclei.title: Voynich Formal Compiler
corpus_nuclei.role: Demonstrates the strongest no-stop manuscript contract and explicit output ordering in the workspace.
corpus_nuclei.pressure: Its rigor is high, but its contract has not yet been lifted into a shared corpus-wide operating law.

corpus_nuclei.title: CPU Framework
corpus_nuclei.role: Defines text-as-compute, wave compilation, witness law, and 1->4->16->64 operating depth.
corpus_nuclei.pressure: The compute grammar is strong, but it is not yet the universal compiler for every active shell.

corpus_nuclei.title: QSHRINK Internal Operating System
corpus_nuclei.role: Shows how a private Athena-native framework can hold control, swarm, metro, manuscripts, and loop skill together.
corpus_nuclei.pressure: Its internal depth is high, but whole-corpus integration still needs to feed it with stronger upstream routes.

corpus_nuclei.title: Trading Bot Gap Inspector
corpus_nuclei.role: States the clearest existing diagnosis of breadth-density imbalance, shallow route proof, and named-not-executed recursion.
corpus_nuclei.pressure: The same gap pattern repeats across the whole corpus, not only inside Trading Bot.

corpus_nuclei.title: Void Chapter 11
corpus_nuclei.role: Provides the strongest local zero-point treatise and a detailed DQIV operator model for extracting structure from apparent absence.
corpus_nuclei.pressure: The zero-point logic is rich, but it still needs more deterministic routes into day-to-day operating surfaces.

corpus_nuclei.title: Google Docs Ingress
corpus_nuclei.role: Owns the intended external-memory bridge into live Google Docs.
corpus_nuclei.pressure: The bridge is structurally present but blocked by missing OAuth credentials.

party_stack.title: Azure Gatebreakers
party_stack.mission: Break sealed boundaries between the local organism and the missing live-memory half without damaging witness law.

party_stack.title: Obsidian Delvers
party_stack.mission: Surface hidden frameworks from the archive and turn them into editable, routeable working roots.

party_stack.title: Silver Cartographers
party_stack.mission: Convert manuscript families into metro lines, chapter receipts, and transfer hubs that others can actually traverse.

party_stack.title: Crimson Cortex
party_stack.mission: Turn live board motion into durable shell updates, receipts, queue shifts, and next-seed artifacts.

party_stack.title: Verdant Rootkeepers
party_stack.mission: Collapse duplicate families, grow mirrors where needed, and preserve canonical lineage while the corpus expands.

party_stack.title: Ivory Tribunal
party_stack.mission: Raise truth quality so the organism can trust its own motion without becoming rigid.

party_stack.title: Zodiac Vanguard
party_stack.mission: Occupy currently empty pantheon cells, seed missing ganglia, and give dormant archetypes starter quests.

quests.title: The Sealed Sky Gate
quests.frontier: Unlock the Google Docs ingress and create the first witnessed live-memory route.
quests.reward: Live memory becomes a lawful half of Athena instead of a promised ghost limb.

quests.title: Archive Deep Delve
quests.frontier: Promote one archive-backed framework into a live extracted root with replay receipts.
quests.reward: One dark reservoir becomes part of the everyday working nervous system.

quests.title: Voynich Metro Engine
quests.frontier: Build the manuscript-family metro and chapter receipt layer for the Voynich body.
quests.reward: Athena gains a reusable symbolic transit system drawn from its strongest manuscript engine.

quests.title: The MATH Forge Bridge
quests.frontier: Land one math family into a tested runtime bridge and witness-bearing module.
quests.reward: Athena proves that formal depth can become executable force without losing rigor.

quests.title: Canonical Collapse Crusade
quests.frontier: Resolve duplicated manuscript families and expand markdown mirrors for high-value canon.
quests.reward: The organism gains a healthier boundary between canonical, mirror, derived, and historical surfaces.

quests.title: Cortex Writeback Rite
quests.frontier: Bind live board events, claims, and wave outputs back into shell, ledger, and queue surfaces after each run.
quests.reward: Real-time evolution becomes durable memory instead of disappearing momentum.

quests.title: Dormant Pantheon Awakening
quests.frontier: Occupy zero-thread archetype cells and assign them starter missions, packets, and witness rules.
quests.reward: The swarm stops relying on a few overworked archetypes and becomes more truly multidimensional.

quests.title: Truth Corridor Trial
quests.frontier: Raise route legality, truth typing, and health monitoring across the active fronts.
quests.reward: The organism becomes safer to scale because momentum and trust rise together.

appendix_governance.propagation_rule: The full-corpus layer inherits the 7D appendix floor exactly as received and may not mint new appendix identities.

overlay_rules.AppQ: Q references remain overlay-only ingress history and may not outrank the canonical appendix floor.
overlay_rules.AppO: O references remain overlay-only return history and must dock through AppO/AppQ legality rather than creating a second appendix namespace.

chapter_safe_reentry_spine.purpose: Seed-safe re-entry checkpoint for full-corpus routes.
Seed-safe re-entry checkpoint for full-corpus routes.
Seed-safe re-entry checkpoint for full-corpus routes.

shared_transition_laws.docs_gate_law: Live Google Docs remain blocked until Trading Bot/credentials.json and Trading Bot/token.json exist; no transition note may claim live-doc confirmation before that receipt exists.
shared_transition_laws.truth_law: Truth stays corridor-bounded. NEAR and quarantined routes remain visible as bounded pressure and may not be promoted into silent certainty.
shared_transition_laws.earth_gate_law: Any route that changes corpus-wide readiness must show Earth gate state and AppI/AppM support before it is called passed.
shared_transition_laws.dormancy_rule: Dormant agents are latent, not failed; they remain on the board until a concrete quest, packet, or receipt moves them.
shared_transition_laws.promotion_rule: No awakening transition is complete without a concrete corpus receipt tied to an existing quest, bundle, or verified writeback surface.
shared_transition_laws.reentry_rule: Every awakened agent must dock back into the common corpus route map and chapter-safe re-entry spine instead of forking into a private symbolic shell.

AGT-01.current_role: Ignites pattern recognition and knowledge acquisition across the corpus stack.
AGT-01.transition_trigger: Realizing that raw insight needs durable maps, appendix support, and routeable queues.
AGT-01.corpus_symptom: Ideas can ignite faster than the corpus can index, mirror, and dock them back into canon.

verification_receipts.detail: Chapter count, appendix namespace, edge basis, mandatory signature, and HCRL order remain unchanged.
Water bundle retains native basis, appendix support, and five control documents.
Earth receipts and 7D seed route registry remain available for promotion checks.
Hybrid awakening roster contains 4 elemental stages and 12 advanced agents.
Each transition note resolves to one existing party seed and existing quest fronts.
Deep-root 7D authority surfaces resolve locally and remain read-only inputs.
Each agent note references required surfaces that resolve to existing local files or folders.
Q/O routes remain overlay-only holds and stay canonically mapped through AppQ/AppO.
Every passed 7D seed route retains AppI/AppM support before full-corpus promotion.
Replay pointers referenced by Earth sample receipts resolve to existing local witness files.

regeneration_seed.collapse_rule: Collapse first into the 7D seed route registry, then into Earth gate state, then into v4 route plans.
regeneration_seed.reentry_rule: Every awakened agent must dock back into the common corpus route map and chapter-safe re-entry spine instead of forking into a private symbolic shell.
